postToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); if [ "$TOOL_NAME" = "multi_replace_string_in_file" ]; then FILE_PATHS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs | fromjson | .replacements[].filePath'); else FILE_PATHS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs | fromjson | .filePath // empty'); fi; for FILE_PATH in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.rb || "$FILE_PATH" == *.rake ]]; then STREE_CMD='stree'; if command -v bundle &>/dev/null && bundle exec stree version &>/dev/null 2>&1; then STREE_CMD='bundle exec stree'; elif ! command -v stree &>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; if [[ -f .streerc ]]; then $STREE_CMD write --config=.streerc "$FILE_PATH"; else $STREE_CMD write "$FILE_PATH"; fi; fi; done
